title: MC Silver DP RP (X)
description: This resourcepack is required for my datapacks!
body:
This resourcepack requires Fabric or Optifine!
===

For Optifine users:
---
- Requires [​Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)   
- Default settings "Options/Video Settings/Quality"  
    [​Emissive Textures: ON]   
    [​Custom Entity Models: ON]  
    [​Random Entities: ON]   
    [​Custom Items: ON]  

For Fabric users:
---
1. Requires [​Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)  
2. Requires [​Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)  
3. Requires [​Cem Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features)  
4. Requires [​CITResewn Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn)  
5. Requires [​Entity Textures Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric)  
6. Requires [​Puzzle Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/puzzle)  

This resourcepack has all required textures for following datapacks
---
Required for:
- [​Better Village and Pillage Datapack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/better-illagers-v1-0/)

(I won't fix any bugs in previous versions)
===
